runners.formComment: Missed the frame last start when sixth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning five on end before placing two back. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (27.16) in a Free For All, finishing a 17 length eighth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Looks well placed and should feature.

runners.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th on March 17 over 340m at this track behind Don't Tell Tommy beaten 15 lengths (20.16) in a Grade 5. Placed two back at this track. The form out of the last run measures up. Among the chances.
